title: Resolution to Pay Prior Years Expenditures with a Total Amount of Three Hundred Eighty-five Thousand Two Hundred Twenty-eight Pesos & 85/100 (P385,228.85) Chargeable Against the Current Appropriations for the Same Expense Item of the General Services Office and Municipal School Board.
